recentTweets.text:
America has won 8 Summer Olympics in a row. That's American exceptionalism. 

If we are going to continue winning on a global stage, we must preserve our Olympic pipeline. That's what my bill, Protect College Sports Act, will do. https://t.co/f6Dqu6EGI1

Google is a dangerous monopoly.

As Missouri AG, I sued Google for its illegal search monopoly and won the first-ever Big Tech antitrust case.

The D.C. judge gave Google a slap on the wrist. Now @SenAmyKlobuchar and I are filing the SEARCH Act to finish the job and impose order. https://t.co/D7h2q05U4x

The Supreme Court unanimously held that foreign diplomats’ children do NOT receive birthright citizenship.

My investigation found we’ve ignored that rule and potentially granted thousands of illegal citizenships.

I’m demanding @SecRubio and @SecMullin enforce the law. https://t.co/fYphLYHaE4

The Smithsonian receives more than $1 billion a year from taxpayers.

Our National History Museum should inspire awe at America’s liberty, sacrifice, progress, and greatness. It should not teach children to despise their inheritance.

America’s story is worth saving.

Even America’s 250th birthday is treated as a problem.

Museum leaders discussed how to “problematize” the anniversary and stress the Declaration’s “gaps.”

At the moment America should celebrate 250 years of liberty, they want another national scolding. https://t.co/ZBWFRlyIq7

The Smithsonian’s flagship history museum has been captured by radical ideology.

A new White House report reveals how taxpayer-funded exhibits divide Americans, erase our heroes, and teach shame. 🧵 https://t.co/sBI91AfRpP

ANTIFA is an organized, global network of groups causing terror and creating chaos across the world. It must be crushed.

I worked with @SecRubio to designate them as a Foreign Terrorist Organization to give the admin every tool they need to go after these criminals. https://t.co/Rb2xMiZVlr

America fired her and those like her by re-electing President Trump. Good riddance.

What a great to ruin Christmas for families who had already lost so much. https://t.co/brTV0GY3de

The report notes: "Pardon Attorney Oyer did not address the views of specific victims as to specific cases."

Heartless. https://t.co/3NEdT5Vc79
My office has substantiated the 73-page report does indeed list Oyer as the author, as is indicated by the DOJ Report.

Murderers like Dylann Roof, the Boston Marathon Bomber, and the Tree of Life Synagogue Murderer.

Truly heinous criminals. https://t.co/CUlVFf0S6T

She was too scared to admit it. I confronted her with the documents. They're available for the whole world to see. Receipts. 🧵 https://t.co/EySmt5r7th

Diplomats' kids claiming birthright citizenship undermines our sovereignty and cheapens American citizenship.

And it violates the Constitution and statutory law.

DHS and State must investigate and enact policies to end this abuse and ensure We the People's laws are enforced. https://t.co/X2qpHZ9qOr

There are likely thousands—even tens of thousands—of these illegitimate "citizens."

For example, a foreign newspaper found at least 125 of its own country's diplomats' kids illegally claimed US citizenship.

DHS and State must investigate the full extent of this problem. https://t.co/ejCsLaorpW

Diplomats' kids improperly being given citizenship documents poses serious risks.

These fraudulent "citizens" owe allegiance to foreign countries like China, Russia, and Iran, but can vote in our elections, enter our country on a US passport, and engage in chain migration.

So right now, nothing stops a foreign diplomat from getting a standard birth certificate and SSN for their kids.

That means these individuals—despite not actually being citizens according to the Constitution and our laws—have all the documents to illegally CLAIM citizenship. https://t.co/5XN2YxVL24

Diplomats are not "subject to the jurisdiction" of the U.S., so their kids do NOT get birthright citizenship.

Even SCOTUS's flawed majority opinion agreed.

But currently, there are ZERO protections against diplomats illegally getting citizenship documentation for their kids. https://t.co/DukYEjSzXN

SCOTUS badly erred in its birthright citizenship decision.

I'm leading legislation and a constitutional amendment to fix it.

In the meantime, we must plug every loophole foreigners are abusing.

We should start with foreign diplomats' kids.

https://t.co/WV8gu1OYhy

The Supreme Court AGREED 9-0 that foreign diplomats' kids DO NOT receive Birthright Citizenship.

But the federal government has failed to enforce that rule—potentially allowing thousands to obtain citizenship illegally.

I’m demanding @SecRubio and @SecMullinDHS shut this down. https://t.co/2laGqbFpuu

In a bid to become the “High Priestess of the Resistance,” Biden’s rogue Pardon Attorney tried to take down Todd Blanche.

She’s also hawking hoodies for $39.99 (link in her bio).

These grifters let thousands of criminals onto our streets. Todd Blanche is righting the ship. https://t.co/brNpicDAnL

The Hammer & Sickle wave has taken over the Democrat party.

They are Anti-police. Anti-ICE. Anti-Western Civilization.

It’s incredibly dangerous for our country. https://t.co/MqR9mfLYqR

My 3 recommendations to Todd Blanche are this: 

1️⃣Go after sanctuary jurisdictions using every tool available

2️⃣Crush the illegal infrastructure that astroturfs the Left.

3️⃣Protect Americans' free speech from censorship https://t.co/cw1jszUalh

Missouri is helping lead America's next industrial evolution.

I’m proud to have helped bring this investment to KC. It’ll create 10,000 jobs, strengthen our critical supply chains, & cement Missouri as a national hub for critical materials & advanced manufacturing.

Jack Smith (a certified dirtbag) lied to Congress under oath. That's a federal crime.

I just told Attorney General nominee @DAGToddBlanche that Jack Smith should be prosecuted. 

We need justice. The weaponizers must finally face consequences. https://t.co/cWafYZmJgL
RT @RapidResponse47: .@SenEricSchmitt: "I heard one of my colleagues say that 'this is the most troubled DOJ in history.' I happened to liv…

Todd Blanche is a fighter. More importantly, he’s a winner. In his first 100 days as Acting AG, all he’s done is win. Im excited to support his nomination. Let’s get him confirmed. https://t.co/oWmF8IpZVL

But in 1940, Congress changed the statutory text to mirror the Citizenship Clause, rather than the Civil Rights Act's phrasing.

Around this time, people started to (incorrectly) assume the law meant virtually unlimited birthright citizenship.

So I'm restoring the 1866 text. https://t.co/MKeQ49zpFh

This bill wouldn't take effect until SCOTUS overrules or narrows its erroneous constitutional holding.

But we're laying down a marker.

And this bill would set up a test case for SCOTUS to fix its mistake.

Congress must do everything it can to protect American citizenship.

So in 1866, Congress passed a statute excluding temporary aliens' kids from birthright citizenship.

That rule was constitutionalized in the 14A.

And after the 14A was ratified, Congress re-enacted the 1866 text.

The original meaning clearly excluded temporary aliens' kids. https://t.co/BPHTAwII6t

SCOTUS got birthright citizenship dangerously wrong.

I'm filing the American Citizenship Act to start the process of restoring the 14th Amendment's original meaning.

My bill restores the original understanding to prevent birthright citizenship for illegal aliens and tourists. https://t.co/3m2XWdBaKs

🚨Heading to @DAGToddBlanche’s confirmation hearing. 

He’s focused on tackling widespread fraud and taking on violent crime—he’s exactly the type of AG the American people need.

I look forward to his confirmation. https://t.co/restJzxJyh
RT @SenateGOP: Welcome, Senator Darline Graham. https://t.co/FIXlRJQOMJ

Every child has inherent dignity and worth, regardless of ability or appearance.

We must reject any system, technology, or "contract" that pressures the elimination of “imperfect” babies.

Did Jack Smith mislead Congress?

He told the House he didn't access the contents of members of Congress's text messages.

But new records show he accessed the contents of 44 members of Congress's text messages.

We need a full investigation. https://t.co/e3XhPpjukR
Hey Ashik, Come and Take It. https://t.co/nJCJwEgM1F

A notorious rogue judge is trying to tank Todd Blanche’s AG Nomination.

Let’s call this what it is. The deep state is terrified of how effective Todd Blanche has been. We’d be wise to see through this charade.

Todd Blanche is already delivering as Acting AG:

• indicting the SPLC
• denaturalizing fraudsters
• crushing race-based DEI schemes
• shutting down "Learing Centers"

I look forward to confirming @DAGToddBlanche and helping him finish the job.

I’m thankful for the heroic actions of the Missouri National Guard to save so many lives in the midst of this catastrophic flood.

As dangerous conditions continue, please stay vigilant and listen to local authorities.

If you ever needed proof Democrats will choose third-world rapists and murderers over you, look no further.

Tim Walz pardoned Laotian child sex abuser Tou Lue Vang to shield him from deportation.

Thank you @SecRubio for ensuring he was still deported. https://t.co/7py3sWxU13 https://t.co/0EMh6yX8y5

Disparate-impact liability turned NEUTRAL standards into legal liability and mandated pseudo-racial balancing. That judicially created regime is dead.

Great work @DAGToddBlanche and all of DOJ. https://t.co/3X9haPbfY7

Beyond illegal alien anchor babies, more than 1 million children of Chinese birth tourists are on track to become American citizens and voters.

The Supreme Court has critically jeopardized our sovereignty.

Citizenship is worth more than a flight from Beijing to LAX. https://t.co/Y50af1o5cC

So what can we do?

Mass deportations fix this.

Addressing the housing shortage by shrinking the population competing for limited housing eases pressure on rents and home prices, helping American families afford housing without waiting decades for supply to catch up.

Deportations also improve American life: less overcrowding, reduced strain on schools/services, and lower overall costs.

Secure the border, enforce the law, and remove illegals. That's how we restore affordability for American citizens.

Official data from HUD and the Fed's economists shows it.

Mass migration and solving America's housing affordability crisis are incompatible.

Immigration has created an explosive demand shock that's hurting working families. 🧵 https://t.co/dxP1jvmjmm
Read more: https://t.co/HeF3ElZujh

The world's most advanced fighter jet, the F-47, will be built right here in St. Louis—Fighterland USA—by the skilled men and women who have helped make our home a hub for American defense.

The F-47 will ensure America's air dominance on the world stage for years to come. https://t.co/QJmx6h1KSh

The Birthright Citizenship case hinged on the 14th Amendment’s “subject to the jurisdiction thereof.”

Illegal aliens blatantly flout our jurisdiction and are usually subject to the jurisdiction of foreign powers.

We must restore American citizenship and sovereignty. https://t.co/2YQf2lKJYS

For America 250: Be Unapologetically American. Be a Patriot. Love your nation.

Today we celebrate the greatest nation ever built. Tomorrow we fight like hell to preserve it.

America is for Americans. https://t.co/6nWfR3L8Dg

Happy 250th to the greatest country on earth.

Proud to be an American🇺🇸 https://t.co/KmY2TBBoF1

Birthright citizenship for illegal aliens and tourists is a dramatic departure from the Framers of the 14th Amendment’s understanding of citizenship. 

The consequences of the Supreme Court’s decision will be disastrous. 

We must restore the meaning of American citizenship. https://t.co/XZtSObOGAe

The first duty of government is to protect the American people.

Not illegal aliens.

Democrats have lost sight of that basic responsibility—and American families are paying the price. https://t.co/IQmTFWbpc7
